name: DART-VLN: Test-Time Memory Decay and Anti-Loop Regularization for Discrete Vision-Language Navigation
summary: arXiv:2607.01043v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Memory-based discrete vision-language navigation (VLN) agents must act under partial observability, yet even strong frozen backbones remain...
description: arXiv:2607.01043v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Memory-based discrete vision-language navigation (VLN) agents must act under partial observability, yet even strong frozen backbones remain vulnerable at test time. Two common failure modes are stale historical evidence at memory readout and inefficient local backtracking during action selection. We present DART-VLN, a training-free test...
author: Shaoheng Zhang, Zhichen Li, Jie Mei
